name: Maliss of the Fallen Game
desc:
Pay half your LP; banish all cards in your GY, then, for every 2 "Maliss" cards banished by this effect, randomly banish 1 card from your opponent's Extra Deck until the End Phase. Opponents' cards that are banished by this card's effect cannot activate their effects until the End Phase.
You can only activate 1 "Maliss of the Fallen Game" per turn.
strings: Pay half your LP, banish GY, banish opponent Extra Deck
